metadata.description: Dual-mode token compression for Claude — cuts token usage 65-75% with zero loss of technical accuracy

plugins.name: spartan-skill
plugins.description: Dual-mode token compression skill. Output side (spartan out) makes Claude respond terse. Input side (spartan in) compresses pasted docs/context. Three intensity levels: lite / full / ultra. Works in Claude.ai, Cowork, and Claude Code — no CLI required.
